config_entries.label: DAC Type
config_entries.description: Must be external. Use an external DAC, for example the ES8311 or ES8388.

config_entries.label: Audio DAC
config_entries.description: The [audio DAC](https://esphome.io/components/audio_dac/) to use for volume control.

config_entries.label: I2S Audio ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the I²S Audio you wish to use for this speaker.

config_entries.label: I2S Dout Pin
config_entries.description: The GPIO pin to use for the I²S DOUT (Data Out) signal.

config_entries.label: Bits Per Sample
config_entries.description: The bit depth of the audio samples sent to the DAC. One of 8bit, 16bit, 24bit, or 32bit. Defaults to 16bit.

config_entries.label: Buffer Duration
config_entries.description: The duration of the internal ring buffer. Larger values can reduce stuttering but uses more memory. Defaults to 500ms.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: The channel of the speaker. One of left, right, mono, or stereo. If stereo, the input data should be twice as big, with each right sample followed by a left sample. left and right mute the unused channel, while mono plays the same samples on both. Defaults to mono.

config_entries.label: I2S Comm Fmt
config_entries.description: The I²S communication standard format used by this speaker.

config_entries.label: I2S Mode
config_entries.description: The I²S mode to use. One of primary (clock driven by the host) or secondary (clock driven by the attached device). Defaults to primary.

config_entries.label: MCLK Multiple
config_entries.description: The multiple of the MCLK frequency to the sample rate. Must be divisible by 3 if using 24 bits per sample. One of 128, 256, 384, 512. Defaults to 256.

config_entries.label: Sample Rate
config_entries.description: I2S sample rate. If in primary I²S mode the sample rate of the audio stream is used. Defaults to 16000.

config_entries.label: Spdif Mode
config_entries.description: Enable SPDIF (Sony/Philips Digital Interface Format) mode for digital audio output. When enabled, the speaker outputs a SPDIF-encoded bitstream suitable for optical (TOSLINK) or coaxial digital audio transmission. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Timeout
config_entries.description: How long to wait after finishing playback before releasing the bus. Set to never to never stop the speaker due to a timeout. Defaults to 500ms. Note: With spdif_mode: true (see below), buffer underflows are filled with silence frames until the specified interval elapses; this maintains the SPDIF signal to prevent the receiver from detecting a loss of signal/source change, which may otherwise lengthen gaps of silence.

config_entries.label: Use Apll
config_entries.description: I2S using APLL as main I2S clock, enable it to get accurate clock. Defaults to false.
